CheckoutActivity - Class in com.example.CampusEventDiscovery.ui.event
CheckoutActivity.java Collects attendee payment information, processes a demo payment via MockPaymentService, creates an RSVP with a QR payload, and navigates to TicketActivity.

DevBypassHelper - Class in com.example.CampusEventDiscovery.util
Shared helper for launching the developer bypass role picker.
DevSessionManager - Class in com.example.CampusEventDiscovery.util
Stores a local-only developer bypass session used when no Firebase user is signed in.

EventProposal - Class in com.example.CampusEventDiscovery.model
EventProposal.java Model class representing a proposal document from the event_proposals collection in Firestore.

Required empty constructor for Firestore deserialization.
